Interface DocumentationAdapter

public interface DocumentationAdapter
A documentation adapter is used for extracting information out of Documentable objects. It collects this information into a tree-like format that can then be output into other formats.
See Also:
  • DocumentationGenerator

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    DocumentationAdapter.Reference
    A reference is a way to refer to another Documentable that has been written to an adapter.

  • Method Details

    • of

      static DocumentationAdapter of(SkriptAddon addon)
      Creates and populates an adapter with documentation for elements provided by addon. This default implementation covers:
      • SyntaxInfos
      • ClassInfos
      • Experiments
      Parameters:
      addon - The addon to extract documentation from.
      Returns:
      A populated adapter.

    • of

      static DocumentationAdapter of(SkriptAddon addon, BiConsumer<DocumentationAdapter, Documentable> writeHandler)
      Creates and populates an adapter with documentation for elements provided by addon. This default implementation covers:
      • SyntaxInfos
      • ClassInfos
      • Experiments
      Parameters:
      addon - The addon to extract documentation from.
      writeHandler - A consumer to be called for every written Documentable. This is called after Documentable.write(DocumentationAdapter) but before Documentable.postWrite(DocumentationAdapter). Thus, it is useful for intercepting certain documentables to write additional data.
      Returns:
      A populated adapter.

    • addon

      SkriptAddon addon()
      Returns:
      The addon to extract information from.

    • write

      default void write(Documentable documentable)
      Writes a documentable to this adapter.
      Parameters:
      documentable - The documentable to write.

    • write

      void write(String key, Object value)
      Writes a new entry to this adapter.
      Parameters:
      key - The name of the entry.
      value - The value of the entry.

    • enterScope

      void enterScope(String key)
      Enters a new scope, which represents a new level of information. For example, all DefaultSyntaxInfos.Expressions may be represented within a scope, and each individual Expression within a scope.
      Parameters:
      key - The name of the scope to enter.

    • exitScope

      void exitScope()
      Exits the last entered scope. Must follow a enterScope(String) call.

    • currentScope

      String currentScope()
      Returns:
      The name of the scope most recently entered through enterScope(String).

    • dataMap

      Map<String,Object> dataMap()
      Returns:
      The current data map containing all written data.

    • reference

      DocumentationAdapter.Reference reference(Documentable documentable)
      Creates a new reference to a documentable. It is expected that documentable will be written to this adapter at some point.
      Parameters:
      documentable - The documentable to reference.
      Returns:
      A reference to documentable.
